ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the product information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the reviewer joined the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the reviewer */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the reviewer's profile image */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reviewer is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who submitted the review */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "reviewer_location" TEXT /* Location of the reviewer at the time of the review */,
  "reviewer_device" TEXT /* Device used to submit the review */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the reviewer (for fraud detection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being analyzed */,
  "polarity" INTEGER /* Polarity of the sentiment (positive, negative, or neutral) */,
  "predicted_category" TEXT /* Category predicted by the sentiment analysis model */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the sentiment (e.g., key phrases, entities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewer_product" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_features" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "feature_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewer_stats" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews submitted by the reviewer */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the reviewer */,
  "most_helpful_review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the most helpful review by the reviewer */,
  "total_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the reviewer's reviews were marked as helpful */,
  "total_unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the reviewer's reviews were marked as unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_stats" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews submitted for the product */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating given to the product */,
  "most_helpful_review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the most helpful review for the product */,
  "total_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the product's reviews were marked as helpful */,
  "total_unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the product's reviews were marked as unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "top_reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews submitted by the reviewer */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the reviewer */,
  "most_helpful_review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the most helpful review by the top reviewer */,
  "total_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the top reviewer's reviews were marked as helpful */,
  "total_unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the top reviewer's reviews were marked as unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "top_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews submitted for the product */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating given to the product */,
  "most_helpful_review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the most helpful review for the top product */,
  "total_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the top product's reviews were marked as helpful */,
  "total_unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the top product's reviews were marked as unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewer_product_category" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id", "product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewer_sentiment" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id", "sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sentiment" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "sentiment_id")
)
